docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A. HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PHELEN, SHARON O $7,295.79 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,515.79, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1304(C)

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S (AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED ( PRINCIPAL - $ 7,295.79). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
